title: How a man of God pursues a woman (without leading with need)
caption:
The guy desperate for a wife reeks of it — and she can tell.

A man who doesn't need her to complete him is the only man actually worth marrying. That's not coldness. That's a man who's full enough to love her well, not empty enough to use her.

You pursue her clearly. You lead with honesty, not performance. You hold the outcome open-handed. And you trust that if God gave you the want, He can handle the answer.

"Delight yourself in the Lord, and he will give you the desires of your heart." — Psalm 37:4. That's not a formula for getting the girl. It's a picture of the man who can actually love her.

Save this for the man still waiting. The wait isn't wasted — it's the work.

#faith #christianmen #godlymen #manofgod #masculinity #christianity #scripture #relationships #thevision
theme: He chases God, not a wife.
